name: Relentless Expanse
short_description: Capture and upgrade planets, outsmart your enemies, and conquer the galaxy! Simple yet addicting, you can play alone or outsmart your friends in this 2D top-down space RTS. Completely free, no monetization, just fun!
detailed_description:
Capture and upgrade planets, outsmart your enemies, and conquer the galaxy! Simple yet addicting, you can play alone or outsmart your friends in this 2D top-down space RTS. Completely free, no monetization, just fun!

Relentless Expanse was made by a small team to gain experience, we don't care about money, we just want you to have fun! 

The goal of the game is to send your ships to capture other planets and defeat every other enemy in the galaxy. Upgrade your planets using energy to make them more powerful, and strategically outsmart your enemies with your superior tactics!
